props.text: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
props.name: Peter Drucker
props.title: Management Consultant

props.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower. Your time is limited, so do not waste it living someone else's life. Do not be trapped by dogma, which is living with the results of other people's thinking.
props.name: Steve Jobs
props.title: Co-founder, Apple Inc.

props.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
props.name: Steve Jobs
props.title: Co-founder, Apple Inc.
